title: Is it true the Eva tried to trap Shinji inside after Zeruel
display_title: Is it true the Eva tried to trap Shinji inside after Zeruel
wikitext:
[]: Is it true the Eva tried to trap Shinji inside after Zeruel?             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Thu May 14, 2009 8:42 pm I figured Shinji simply didn't know if he wanted to return or not, not that the Eva itself had any control in that condition--his words when he comes back ("I just wanted to see them all again") indicates it. In Yui's case, it was an active decision, too. The wikipedia article claims the Eva itself is an entity separate from Yui. >_>

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Thu May 14, 2009 9:09 pm You sorta answered your question there. Although yui can be considered separate from shougoki in some ways, coming back was always his decision, shown by when Ritsuko asks "Dont you want to come back Shinji?" Also, juding by the fact that yui asks him "What do you want" shows she may have had control over the situation but it was up to Shinji as to what would happen

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu May 14, 2009 9:27 pm The manga shows another body holding onto Shinji then his mother comes along.

[]: Re: Is it true the Eva tried to trap Shinji inside after Zer             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu May 14, 2009 9:34 pm FallenTabris wrote: -his words when he comes back ("I just wanted to see them all again") indicates it.

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Thu May 14, 2009 10:55 pm Ah. Well, at any rate, do you think the Eva itself was meant to be an entity of ill intent towards Shinji?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu May 14, 2009 11:17 pm FallenTabris wrote: Ah. Well, at any rate, do you think the Eva itself was meant to be an entity of ill intent towards Shinji?

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Fri May 15, 2009 12:02 am Alright Reichu but what is that body holding onto Shinji..? Edit: Thank you Reichu, no need to start a new thread for my questions have been answered.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri May 15, 2009 12:42 am FallenTabris wrote: Ah. Well, at any rate, do you think the Eva itself was meant to be an entity of ill intent towards Shinji?

[]:             Quote Post by etjusticepourtous » Fri May 15, 2009 11:03 am It is me or you guys never reach a conclusion.

[]:             Quote Post by PuppetChaos » Fri May 15, 2009 11:30 am etjusticepourtous wrote: It is me or you guys never reach a conclusion.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Fri May 15, 2009 12:28 pm thats why some people call the show a "puzzle" thats open to interpretation

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Fri May 15, 2009 1:17 pm There was that "Don't you want to become one with me?" bit. I wonder whether it was Shinji's own psyche playing out some fantasies of sex and unity, or Yui was using the images from Shinji's "to do" (ha ha) list as a way of exploring whether or not the boy wanted to return to reality. She may have thought if she just have asked him the question in her own form, it would have caused Shinji to freak out even more. Maybe if Shinji would have chosen staying, Yui would have granted him his wish. And maybe she would have been thoroughly disappointed.

[]: Re: Is it true the Eva tried to trap Shinji inside after Zer             Quote Post by Synapsid » Sat May 16, 2009 9:38 pm Well Sadamoto's version did imply of some sort of malignant person in the EVA that tried to masquerade as Yui and trap Shinji, and Rei having some sort of telepathic link with Shinji that helps rescue him. [URL=http://s528.photobucket.com/albums/dd325/Synapsidia/EVA/?action=view&current=Evangelion-Vol08Stage50-pg051.jpg] [/URL] [URL=http://s528.photobucket.com/albums/dd325/Synapsidia/EVA/?action=view&current=Evangelion-Vol08Stage50-pg052.jpg] [/URL] Of course as Reichu noted the manga and it's events are exclusive from the rest of EVA and may depart in style althogether, as the difference between maternal AnimeKaworu, and MangaKaworu who''s trying to have buttsex with tsundere Shinji shows . NAveryW wrote: Why would his mother have ill intent towards him then be so nice to him in EoE?

[]: Re: Is it true the Eva tried to trap Shinji inside after Zer             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat May 16, 2009 9:48 pm Synapsid wrote: She didn't seem to have any good intent or be very nice

[]: Re: Is it true the Eva tried to trap Shinji inside after Zer             Quote Post by Synapsid » Sat May 16, 2009 9:59 pm Reichu wrote: It's the "God works in mysterious ways" trope.

[]: Re: Is it true the Eva tried to trap Shinji inside after Zer             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sat May 16, 2009 10:42 pm Synapsid wrote: Reichu wrote: It's the "God works in mysterious ways" trope.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat May 16, 2009 11:07 pm I know it's hard not to mention Yui and motivations at all here, but let's try to avoid converting this topic into another one of these , if we can.
